title: Question: glbl.GTS
body:
---


Author Name: **Adolfo Sanchez**
Original Redmine Message: 174 from https://www.veripool.org



---

I'm trying to do a verification enviroment for a managment unit of an MAC.
But I've problems becouse the Verilog Model use a module calle IOBUF.v this module uses
glbl.GTS. I've read the topic about using Verilator with Xilinx proyects but the glbl.v doesn't have GTS.
So I'm stuck at this point.

The other error, is becaouse IOBUF use 
"parameter integer DRIVE=12"
but when I try to compile with verilator it displays this error:
IOBUF.v:28: syntax error, unexpected integer, expecting '['

I hope you can help me with this issue.

Thanks and sorry for my bad english.

I would
